headline: Recovery still in early stage. Peg restoration and program participation lagging.

subscores.label: Peg restoration
subscores.method: scaled from $0.66 (depeg low) → $0.98 (staking-ratchet halt, per SIP-420)

subscores.label: Jubilee progress
subscores.method: 30% structural (Phase 2 $10M precondition) + 70% burning ($60M outcome) — burning is the actual recovery driver; structural deposits are a precondition, not the recovery itself

subscores.label: Organic buy support
subscores.method: organic buy ÷ sells (24h, capped 1.0×) — captures whether organic market bids are outpacing sell pressure, not just composition purity

subscores.label: Exit-pressure index
subscores.method: exit-pressure index: growth (35%) + backlog (30%) + sell-through (35%) — from Unstake Queue panel
